arts.ttl: Early goal spells FA Youth Cup heartbreak for Watford
arts.sum: It wasn't to be in the FA Youth Cup semi-final but the Hornet youngsters did the club proud against the strongest team in the country.

arts.ttl: LIVE: FA Youth Cup semi-final Watford v Man City
arts.sum: Can Watford beat the holders and reach the final?

arts.ttl: Preview: West Bromwich Albion vs. Watford - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between West Bromwich Albion and Watford, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: West Brom injury update as Tony Mowbray sweats on three players and fresh worry
arts.sum: Tony Mowbray is sweating on the availability of a host of West Bromwich Albion players ahead of what is a crucial fixture in the make up of their season, when they welcome Watford to The Hawthorns on Saturday.
